name: macos-release
description: Automate macOS app and CLI release preparation, packaging, and publishing.

interface.longDescription: Guide or automate version bumps, builds, packaging, local install verification, GitHub Releases, and Homebrew publishing for macOS software.
defaultPrompt: Prepare a dry-run release plan for this macOS app.
Review this repository for missing release automation steps.
Set up a release script for build, DMG, GitHub Release, and Homebrew.
